title: cattleya × neocalimaniorum
intro: Cattleya × neocalimaniorum, a hybrid orchid, is the product of crossing Cattleya labiata with Cattleya graniflora. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cattleya × neocalimaniorum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
